description: You are an architecture student creating a parametric model of an equilateral Gothic pointed arch for a History of Architecture class project. Create a fully constrained closed 2D profile of an equilateral Gothic arch in SolveSpace. The profile must consist of a 60 mm horizontal baseline and two circular arcs. Each arc must have a radius of 60 mm, with the left arc centered at the right end of the baseline and the right arc centered at the left end of the baseline. The arcs must meet at a single apex to form a symmetric, closed shape. Save the completed file as /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/gothic_arch.slvs.
